models.description: Best 8 GB option. Code specialist, 88.4% HumanEval, native tool calling, 92+ languages.
Best 16 GB option. 53.6% SWE-bench Verified (#1 open-source). Trained for agentic coding.
16 GB alt. MoE 16B/2.4B active. Fast inference, 338 languages.
32 GB tier. MoE 30B/3B active. Agentic tool use, 256K context.
Fast 2B model. Fits in GPU on 8 GB M2. Tool calling unreliable on complex tasks.
General 7B model. Pre-2025, no code specialization. Prefer qwen2.5-coder for dojo.
